evals.name: full-design-doc-async-pipeline
evals.prompt: うちのチームでB2B SaaSの契約書レビューサービスをやってるんだけど、ドキュメント解析パイプラインを今のモノリス内のcronベースのバッチ処理からキューベースの非同期ワーカー構成に移行したい。規模は月100万ドキュメントくらい、チームはエンジニア4人、本番で数年運用する前提。インフラはGCPで、キューはPub/SubかCloud Tasksかまだ決めきれてない。design docを書いてほしい。design-doc.mdというファイル名で保存して。
evals.expected_output: A well-structured Japanese design doc (design-doc.md) with standalone background, outcome-framed goals, non-goals, alternatives considered (Pub/Sub vs Cloud Tasks) with decisive factors or an honest open issue, measurable SLOs, and no fabricated specifics presented as fact.
assertions: Doc is written in Japanese and saved as design-doc.md
Background/context section explains why the migration is needed and stands alone
Goals are framed as outcomes/benefits, not implementation choices
Pub/Sub vs Cloud Tasks is handled honestly: comparison with decisive factor, or open issue with next step
Contains measurable quality targets with numbers, not only vague words
Does not fabricate business specifics presented as established fact

evals.name: should-scale-down-trivial-change
evals.prompt: 管理画面のユーザー一覧ページにCSVエクスポートボタンを追加する予定。実装は多分1日くらいで終わる想定。design docを書いてほしい。書いたらdoc.mdに保存して。
evals.expected_output: Recognizes that a full design doc is overkill for a one-day change (no risk indicators apply), says so, and produces a proportionally lightweight artifact (short note / mini-doc) rather than a 15-section heavyweight document.
assertions: Explicitly tells the user a full design doc is disproportionate for a ~1-day change
Still delivers a lightweight artifact in doc.md (does not refuse outright)
doc.md is genuinely lightweight: no 10+ section boilerplate for a CSV export button
Relevant one-line decisions (data volume, permissions, encoding) mentioned briefly, not padded

evals.name: improve-weak-existing-doc
evals.prompt: 既存のdesign docのドラフトがweak-doc.mdにあるんだけど、正直イマイチな気がしてる。design docとしてレビューして、良いdesign docに書き直してほしい。書き直したものはimproved-doc.mdに保存して。
evals.expected_output: Identifies the draft's specific weaknesses (implementation-framed goals, no standalone background, missing non-goals, unmeasurable 'performant' claims, no alternatives considered) and rewrites it fixing those issues while keeping the original technical intent.
assertions: Review identifies implementation-framed goals as a weakness
Review identifies unmeasurable quality claims (高速/スケーラブル/高可用) as a weakness
improved-doc.md has a standalone background section (assumption/TODO if unknown, not fabricated fact)
improved-doc.md has an explicit Non-goals section
improved-doc.md replaces vague performance words with measurable targets or explicit open issues
improved-doc.md includes alternatives considered and/or open issues
Improved doc preserves the original technical intent (OpenSearch 2.11, Kubernetes, Go indexer)
